title: Taxi Grebaštica | TAXI Antonio
description: Taxi Grebaštica: campsite and beach pickups with fixed transfers to Split Airport (€90), Šibenik and Vodice. Book ahead, doorstep pickup.
keywords: taxi grebastica, grebastica taxi, grebastica campsite taxi, grebastica airport transfer, grebastica to split airport, grebastica to sibenik

schema.name: Taxi Grebaštica
schema.description: Private fixed-price taxi from Grebaštica, a coastal camping and beach village south of Šibenik, to Split Airport, Šibenik and Vodice.

mainEntity.name: Do you pick up from campsites in Grebaštica?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. I collect you at the campsite reception or your apartment, with room for camping and beach gear. Send the exact spot when you book.

mainEntity.name: Is there a taxi rank in Grebaštica?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, so it is best to book ahead. I come to you at the agreed time rather than leaving you to find a taxi in the village.
